name: Morgan Lee
content: Unit three is reporting another calibration warning after maintenance.

name: Riley Chen
content: The diagnostic shows a stale calibration record, not a hardware fault.

name: Morgan Lee
content: Should we take the unit apart for inspection?

name: Riley Chen
content: No. Run remote calibration while the unit is idle and send me the result.

name: Riley Chen
content: Calibration completed and all readings are in range.

name: Morgan Lee
content: The 48-hour verification period completed without warnings.

name: Morgan Lee
content: Two shift supervisors need access to the utilization view.

name: Riley Chen
content: I will provision read-only accounts for them.

name: Morgan Lee
content: Will they be able to inspect utilization for each unit?

name: Riley Chen
content: Yes. The view includes per-unit utilization and status history.

name: Morgan Lee
content: Both accounts can view the panel now.
